evidence_quotes.quote: that relies on 2nd or 3rd party servers

paragraphs.text: Many thanks reading this. I learned of this initiative from the Stop Killing Games initiative and I also heard of this initiative which I read and support. I would like to add some feedback regarding the inclusion of games or interactive media. In particular games that rely on a 2nd or 3rd party. In most of the cases where of a game that relies on 2nd or 3rd party servers, the owner of a game or piece of media has the risk of losing that content whenever the content reaches end of life. Even if they bought a perpetual license with them. This is sad and destroys not only art and entertainent but more importantly, in my opinion, it loses the aspect of owning itself. I think that games should be included in the digital fairness act if at all possible to prevent future and current ownership of games/media/content being destoyed. Thank you again for your time and patience.
